# `x-thumbgen`

Generate image thumbnails using ImageMagick


- **Usage**: `x-thumbgen [FLAGS] <source_dir>`

## Arguments

### `<source_dir>`

Directory containing images

## Flags

### `-h --help`

Show help

### `-o <output_dir>`

Output directory (default: same as source)

### `-s <suffix>`

Thumbnail suffix (default: _thumb)
